### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/image (github.com/containers/image/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.32.1`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.32.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/image/compare/v5.32.0...v5.32.1)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/storage to v1.55.0, c/image to v5.32.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2495](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2495)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbauerster/mpb/v8 to v8.7.5 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2496](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2496)
-   Record (TOC digest → DiffID) mapping in BlobInfoCache by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2321](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2321)
-   Revamp codespell by [@​kolyshkin](https://togithub.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2498](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2498)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/oauth2 to v0.22.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2501](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2501)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.8.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2502](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2502)
-   manifest: LayerInfos: preallocate the slice by [@​kolyshkin](https://togithub.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2499](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2499)
-   zstd:chunked refactoring for early review by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2503](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2503)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/crypto to v0.26.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2504](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2504)
-   Record zstd:chunked format, and annotations, in BlobInfoCache by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2487](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2487)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/image/compare/v5.32.0...v5.32.1

</details>
